title: calepina prostrata
intro: Calepina prostrata, also known as prostrate cress or creeping yellow cress, is a small flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Calepina prostrata include its potential to help with urinary tract issues, such as kidney stones and UTIs, as well as its ability to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
